item.title: Why Was This Vehicle So Cheap?
item.description: A look at why this vehicle was priced so low, with practical insight into what buyers should check before making a purchase. What factors can make a car seem like a bargain?

media:content.media:title: Why Was This Vehicle So Cheap?
media:content.media:description: A look at why this vehicle was priced so low, with practical insight into what buyers should check before making a purchase. What factors can make a car seem like a bargain?

item.title: Top 5 Vehicles to Buy for $10,000 or Less
item.description: A look at five budget-friendly vehicles that offer strong value, reliability, and practicality without breaking the bank. Which one delivers the best bang for your buck?

media:content.media:title: Top 5 Vehicles to Buy for $10,000 or Less
media:content.media:description: A look at five budget-friendly vehicles that offer strong value, reliability, and practicality without breaking the bank. Which one delivers the best bang for your buck?

item.title: Major Issues With Our Asphalt Project
item.description: A look at the major issues that came up with our asphalt project. What went wrong, and what should you watch for before starting a similar job?

item.title: Corvette Deal Conditions and Ownership Insights
item.description: A Corvette-focused discussion about a deal with conditions, plus practical car ownership context. What would you ask for before handing over the keys?

item.title: I Got Soaked for This
item.description: A reaction to a frustrating vehicle or dealership situation leads to disbelief over what was delivered. What went wrong in the deal?

item.title: Why a Customer Is Taking a Dealer to Court
item.description: A dealership dispute escalates into legal action as a customer challenges what was sold or promised. What triggered the decision to go to court?

item.title: Did My Wife Mess Up Buying This 3500?
item.description: A real-world truck purchase raises questions about value, condition, and whether the deal made sense after everything is revealed. What issues come up after the buy?
